inputs.label: Total Floor Area
inputs.businessContext: Total available warehouse floor space in square feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total available warehouse floor space in square feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrekare cinsinden toplam kullanılabilir depo taban alanı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale disponible de l'entrepôt en pieds carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espacio total disponible en el piso del almacén en pies cuadrados.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي مساحة أرضية المستودع المتاحة بالقدم المربع

inputs.label: Storage Area Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total floor area dedicated to storage (pallet racks, shelving).

label_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la zone de stockage

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total floor area dedicated to storage (pallet racks, shelving).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam taban alanının depolamaya (palet rafları, raf sistemleri) ayrılan yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gesamtfläche, der für die Lagerung genutzt wird (Palettenregale, Regale)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la surface totale dédié au stockage (racks à palettes, rayonnages).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del área total del piso dedicada al almacenamiento (estanterías para pallets, anaqueles).
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من إجمالي مساحة الأرضية المخصصة للتخزين (رفوف المنصات، الأرفف)

inputs.label: Aisle Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of main travel aisles in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of main travel aisles in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana taşıma koridorlarının fit cinsinden genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur des allées de circulation principales en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de los pasillos principales de circulación en pies.

inputs.label: Pallet Flow Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of pallet storage system used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of pallet storage system used.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de système de stockage de palettes utilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de sistema de almacenamiento de pallets utilizado.

inputs.label: Average Pallet Size (footprint)
inputs.businessContext: Average footprint of a single pallet (length x width).

label_i18n.fr: Taille moyenne des palettes (empreinte au sol)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average footprint of a single pallet (length x width).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir paletin ortalama ayak izi (uzunluk x genişlik).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Grundfläche einer einzelnen Palette (Länge x Breite).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Empreinte au sol moyenne d'une palette (longueur x largeur).
businessContext_i18n.es: Huella promedio de un solo pallet (largo x ancho).

inputs.label: Average Inventory Turns per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.

label_i18n.fr: Rotation moyenne des stocks par an
label_i18n.es: Rotaciones de inventario promedio por año

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times inventory is cycled annually.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fois que le stock est renouvelé annuellement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de veces que el inventario se cicla anualmente.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse operators.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de la main-d'œuvre par heure
label_i18n.es: Costo de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully loaded hourly wage for warehouse operators.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Depo operatörleri için tam yüklü saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire chargé des opérateurs d'entrepôt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario por hora totalmente cargado para operadores de almacén.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of material handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly cost of material handling equipment (forklifts, pallet jacks).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme taşıma ekipmanının (forklift, palet jakı) saatlik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire des équipements de manutention (chariots élévateurs, transpalettes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo por hora del equipo de manejo de materiales (montacargas, transpaletas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة بالساعة لمعدات مناولة المواد (الرافعات الشوكية، الرافعات اليدوية)

rules.message: Storage area must not exceed total floor area.
Aisle width inconsistent with selected layout type.
Utilization and turns must be within realistic ranges.

thresholds.message: Storage utilization below 70% indicates wasted space.
Utilization above 95% may cause congestion and safety risks.
Low inventory turns suggest overstocking or slow movers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
